tech_news.title: Gamers Hate Nvidia's DLSS 5. Developers Aren’t Crazy About It Either - WIRED
tech_news.description: Nvidia’s new AI upscaling gaming technology struck gamers as uncanny and off-putting. Developers don't seem to like it, either, but it could be “the default” in a few years.

tech_news.title: Samsung's Galaxy Z TriFold Replaced My Phone, Tablet, and Laptop—But There's a Big Catch - PCMag
tech_news.description: The Galaxy Z TriFold aims to be an all-in-one device—serving as your phone, tablet, and even a makeshift laptop. It largely delivers on that promise, though its price is undeniably steep, and Samsung is no longer selling new models.
